sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_NAME name, PROPERTY_VALUE value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID=#TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME=#name# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT date_format(C.CONNECTTIME, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S') time ,C.sequence ,C.userid ,C.usernm ,C.usernm2 ,C.deptid ,C.deptnm ,C.deptnm2 ,C.title ,C.title2 ,C.companyid ,C.companynm ,C.companynm2 ,C.connectip ,C.connectinfo ,C.connecttime ,C.connectbrowser ,C.connectos ,C.connectagent ,C.tenant_id ,timezone ,lang
FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO C INNER JOIN TBL_USERLOCALINFO U ON C.USERID = U.USERID WHERE C.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID# AND U.TENANT_ID=#v_tenantID# ORDER BY SEQUENCE DESC;
